case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. TRAVIS FEARS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-13-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FEARS, TRAVIS AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-25-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-10-2009

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, [NOSASE/C/OPICK-UPBOX] SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FEARS, TRAVIS AN INDIVIDUAL

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
